## What this changes

<!-- One or two lines: which file(s) and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] New scene recipe (`references/scene-cookbook.md`)
- [ ] New / improved template (`references/templates.md`)
- [ ] New style component (`references/style-library.md`)
- [ ] Troubleshooting fix (`references/troubleshooting.md`)
- [ ] Docs / other

## Checklist

- [ ] Renders correctly (Markdown, tables, code fences)
- [ ] Relative links and file paths are valid
- [ ] Adds **distinct** value — not a duplicate of existing content
- [ ] People defaults stay neutral (appearance is an editable slot)
- [ ] Source noted (`Source: original`, or creator/repo) where a pattern came from someone
- [ ] New recipe/template is added to the router (`references/categories.md`)
- [ ] If `gpt-image-2-prompting/` changed, I rebuilt `dist/` (`scripts/build.ps1` or `build.sh`)
